name: Mario and Luigi
description:
「 Let's-a go! 」

「 Okie-dokie! 」

(Magic Windows Sephiroth into atomic particles)

Mary and Lou. Lou and Mary. This duo right here? GOATed. But I feel like everybody knows that. This bot is inspired by their depictions in the Mario and Luigi RPGs. I love those games, especially Superstar Saga and Bowser's Inside Story. As a matter of fact, this Mario RPG subseries is the ONLY one I've played through to completion (I don't know ball regarding SMRPG or PM).

Anyways, since the Bros. are such simple characters, it's actually kinda hard to make chatbots out of them. I like to aim for ~1,000 tokens for my bots, but the two of these guys combined BARELY clear 1,000. And that's WITH some padding. Like I included these guys’ (totally made up) weights for no reason other than I could. And maybe a bit more relevant, I included backstories from my own headcannon since Mario and Luigi have none (not a cannon one).

Have fun with these guys.
creator: DeezNuhts
